headline: Allstate to hold Q2 2026 earnings call Aug. 6, 2026
summary: The Allstate Corporation (NYSE: ALL) announced the schedule for its second-quarter 2026 financial results and earnings conference call.

headline: Raymond James Maintains Strong Buy on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $300
summary: Raymond James  analyst C. Gregory Peters   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Strong Buy and raises the price target from $260 to $300.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Allstate, Raises Price Target to $240
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Bob Huang   maintains Allstate (NYSE:ALL) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $215 to $240.

headline: HSBC Downgrades Allstate to Hold, Raises Price Target to $264
summary: HSBC  analyst Vikram Gandhi   downgrades Allstate (NYSE:ALL) from Buy to Hold and raises the price target from $244 to $264.
